description: DaVinci Resolve 21.0 (free edition) — the CURRENT version installed on target agenthle-winsrv2022-l4.
note: Used by visual_media/chroma_key_from_reference (gpu-license). Target runs 21.0.00047 (build 47); Blackmagic now serves 21.0 build 48 (downloadId e2096c01ac344e33926f9da9b5097c4f) which install.ps1 fetches. dev-win10 has the older 20.3.20009, but per user decision (2026-06-15) the target is KEPT on its current 21.0 — this package pins the current version, not a downgrade.
